<!--
For minor corrections that do NOT change scientific meaning: typos, citation
fixes, formatting, and broken links. If the change would alter scientific
meaning, use the "Proposed canon change" template instead.
-->

## Location

<!-- File path and section / line where the issue appears. -->

## Current text

<!-- Quote the current text exactly. -->

## Proposed correction

<!-- The corrected text. -->

## Reason

<!-- Why is this a correction (e.g. spelling, wrong DOI, dead link)? -->

## Confirmation

- [ ] This change does **not** alter the scientific meaning of the content.
